title: Spicy Venezualan Bowtie Pasta
description: A spicy twist on the classic Venezualan pasta dish. This recipe combines the bold flavors of the Venezualan cuisine with the comfort of a classic bowtie pasta.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the bowtie pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the diced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the sliced chorizo and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until browned.
Add the spicy venezuelan sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked bowtie pasta to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and diced red onion.
